creator: hardy.schumacher@amd.com
text:
Xorg hangs on logout when any application was started that uses libGL.

For e.g. glxgears prints following message:
libGL warning: 3D driver claims to not support visual 0x4b

Hardware:
CPU: AMD Athlon64X2 4800+
Mainboard: Asus A8N DeLuxe
Graphic: Radeon X850-XTPE

EndSection

EndSection

	Option "Composite" "Enable"
EndSection
